'''Trang''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] where he served as a scout in the platoon to [[Cadet Leader|Cadet leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]]. He was killed during an attack on [[AX-456]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
